verdict_reason_external: The engineering layer offers the nine properties as a structural analog for contract durability. The original verse — about the Self's nine properties — is preserved in literal_meaning and traditional_meaning_consensus, with the Shankara/Ramanuja stake in disagreements_among_translators. The engineering layer does not claim BG 2.24 is fundamentally about software contracts; it offers the nine-property structure as a usable engineering audit. The quotable line 'The well-formed contract has nine properties — and Krishna's list is older than any API style guide will ever be' explicitly preserves the precedence: Krishna's list comes first; the API style guide is the analog. PASS.
